original_image_tags: Line graph titled "Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec".

elements.description: A line graph plotting 'Percent in 5-deg sector (%)' on a logarithmic y-axis (0.1 to 100) against 'Angle From Flight Path (deg)' on a linear x-axis (0 to 180). The graph is titled 'Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec'. It contains four data series represented by different markers (triangle, solid circle, open circle, open square) and a legend for 'Breakup q*alpha in deg-lb/ft^2' with values: 'no breakup', '20,000', '10,000', '5,000'. It also includes four theoretical curves labeled 'B = 1,000' with different line styles for 'A = 1.90', 'A = 2.75', 'A = 3.20', and 'A = 3.45'. The graph is captioned 'Figure 9. Atlas IIAS Simulation Results with B = 1,000'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions correctly identify the same line graph, title, axis labels, data series, and caption, with Description B providing more detailed but non-contradictory information.
